mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (member_loginid, member_pwd, member_name, member_email, member_phone, member_grade) VALUES (#{memberLoginid}, #{memberPwd}, #{memberName}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberGrade})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_delete_status = '정상'
AND (member_loginid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR member_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT * FROM member WHERE member_grade_status = '신청' ORDER BY member_created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM member WHERE member_delete_status = '탈퇴' ORDER BY member_deleted_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET member_grade = '우수', member_grade_status = '승인' WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE member SET member_delete_status = '탈퇴', member_deleted_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE member SET member_delete_status = '정상', member_deleted_at = NULL WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
